title: Al-Rashid's Serious Medical Condition and His Premonitions of Death
description: and His Premonitions of Death Muhammad b. al-$abbah al-Tabari has mentioned that his father accompanied al-Rashid on the opening stages when he set out for Khurisan. He went with him as far as al-Nahrawin, and al -Rashid 976. The quarter of Baghdad either owned by or named after al-Rashid 's mother. See Ibn Ali' Tahir Tayfur, 2; Abbott, r2o-I. 977. L e., of the Caliph al-Manger. 978. Jahshiyiri, 214-115; Ya'qubi, Ta'rikh, II, 520; Dinawari, 391, Azdi, 3121 Tabari-Bal'ami, tr., N, 475, K.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
